title: potentilla × nitidula
intro: Potentilla × nitidula, also known as the Pink Cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla × nitidula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
